questions.label: Tell us about yourself (e.g. Where you come from, any siblings, etc.)
questions.placeholder: Example: I'm 23, originally from Texas but living in LA for school. I'm the youngest of three, so I can be a bit spoiled, but I'm super independent! I spend my weekends exploring new coffee shops and vintage stores, though secretly I'm a huge homebody who loves binge-watching reality TV. I can be a little shy at first, but once I'm comfortable, I'll talk your ear off and tease you constantly. I value loyalty above everything and I'm totally the "mom friend" who makes sure everyone is doing okay.
